privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Rock Paper Scissors Online
privacy.description: Learn about our privacy practices and data protection policies for Rock Paper Scissors Online. We prioritize your privacy and data security.

home.subtitle:

privacy.intro: We take your privacy seriously. Here is what you need to know:
privacy.noPersonalDataText: We do not collect or store any personal information like names, emails, or IP addresses.
privacy.anonymousIdText: A random player ID is automatically generated to enable gameplay. This ID is stored in your browser's local storage and is not linked to any personal data.
privacy.simpleAnalyticsText: We use Simple Analytics to understand general website usage - like how many people visit - without tracking individuals or using cookies.
privacy.gameDataText: When you play a multiplayer game, your moves and anonymous player ID are stored in a temporary game room on our servers. This room exists only for the duration of the game and is deleted when the game ends or when you use the delete button below.
privacy.localStorageTitle: What We Store on Your Device
privacy.localStorageText: Your browser stores the following locally: your anonymous player ID, your single-player win and loss counts, and a move history from your last 3 days of games. Game history older than 3 days is automatically removed. None of this data is linked to your identity.
privacy.anonymityText: We don't use cookies, track you across the web, or build user profiles. You can enjoy the game completely anonymously.
privacy.deleteText: This will permanently clear all local data stored on this device (player ID, scores, and game history) and delete any active multiplayer game rooms you are part of.
privacy.deleteAlert: All your data has been cleared and your active game rooms have been deleted.

mainCTA.stakePlaceholder: e.g., who goes first, who washes dishes, etc.
